name: Iph Limited
analysis: IPH has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.8× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$4.0700. Trade idea: entry A$4.2400, stop A$3.6877, target A$5.8967 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
